mapper.select:
SELECT t.task_id, t.project_id, p.project_name, t.task_title, COALESCE(t.task_type_code, 'GENERAL') AS task_type_code FROM schedule_task t INNER JOIN schedule_project p ON p.project_id = t.project_id
AND t.task_id = #{task_id}

SELECT n.node_id, n.task_id, n.parent_node_id, n.node_name, n.node_type, n.sort_order, n.depth, n.description, n.use_yn, n.created_by, n.created_at, n.updated_by, n.updated_at, t.task_title, COALESCE(t.task_type_code, 'GENERAL') AS task_type_code, p.project_id, p.project_name FROM task_node n INNER JOIN schedule_task t ON t.task_id = n.task_id INNER JOIN schedule_project p ON p.project_id = t.project_id
AND n.node_id = #{node_id}

SELECT nmv.node_metric_value_id, nmv.node_id, nmv.metric_def_id, d.metric_name, d.include_in_stats_yn, d.value_slot_count, d.display_order, nmv.value_1, nmv.value_2, nmv.value_3 FROM node_metric_value nmv INNER JOIN task_type_metric_def d ON d.metric_def_id = nmv.metric_def_id WHERE nmv.node_id = #{_parameter} ORDER BY d.display_order ASC, d.metric_def_id ASC
SELECT node_id, task_id, parent_node_id, sort_order, depth FROM task_node WHERE node_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT metric_def_id, task_type_code, metric_name, include_in_stats_yn, value_slot_count, display_order, use_yn FROM task_type_metric_def WHERE metric_def_id = #{metric_def_id} AND task_type_code = #{task_type_code} AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT task_type_code, task_type_name, description, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM schedule_task_type WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY task_type_name ASC, task_type_code ASC

SELECT metric_def_id, task_type_code, metric_name, include_in_stats_yn, value_slot_count, display_order, use_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM task_type_metric_def WHERE task_type_code = #{_parameter} ORDER BY display_order ASC, metric_def_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_type_metric_def WHERE task_type_code = #{_parameter} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.update: SELECT setval( pg_get_serial_sequence('task_node', 'node_id'), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(node_id) FROM task_node), 0) + 1, false )
SELECT setval( pg_get_serial_sequence('task_type_metric_def', 'metric_def_id'), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(metric_def_id) FROM task_type_metric_def), 0) + 1, false )
SELECT setval( pg_get_serial_sequence('node_metric_value', 'node_metric_value_id'), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(node_metric_value_id) FROM node_metric_value), 0) + 1, false )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_node ( task_id, parent_node_id, node_name, node_type, sort_order, depth, description, use_yn, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{task_id}, #{parent_node_id}, #{node_name}, #{node_type}, #{sort_order}, #{depth}, #{description}, #{use_yn}, #{created_by}, #{updated_by} )
mapper.update: UPDATE task_node SET parent_node_id = #{parent_node_id}, node_name = #{node_name}, node_type = #{node_type}, sort_order = #{sort_order}, depth = #{depth}, description = #{description}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, updated_by = #{updated_by}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE node_id = #{node_id}
UPDATE task_node SET parent_node_id = #{parent_node_id}, sort_order = #{sort_order}, depth = #{depth}, updated_by = #{updated_by}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE node_id = #{node_id}

WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT node_id FROM task_node WHERE parent_node_id = #{node_id} UNION ALL SELECT child.node_id FROM task_node child INNER JOIN descendants d ON d.node_id = child.parent_node_id ) UPDATE task_node SET depth = depth + #{depth_delta}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE node_id IN (SELECT node_id FROM descendants)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_metric_value ( node_id, metric_def_id, value_1, value_2, value_3, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{node_id}, #{metric_def_id}, #{value_1}, #{value_2}, #{value_3}, #{created_by}, #{updated_by} ) ON CONFLICT (node_id, metric_def_id) DO UPDATE SET value_1 = EXCLUDED.value_1, value_2 = EXCLUDED.value_2, value_3 = EXCLUDED.value_3, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO task_type_metric_def ( task_type_code, metric_name, include_in_stats_yn, value_slot_count, display_order, use_yn, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{task_type_code}, #{metric_name}, #{include_in_stats_yn}, #{value_slot_count}, #{display_order}, #{use_yn}, #{created_by}, #{updated_by} ) ON CONFLICT (metric_def_id) DO UPDATE SET metric_name = EXCLUDED.metric_name, include_in_stats_yn = EXCLUDED.include_in_stats_yn, value_slot_count = EXCLUDED.value_slot_count, display_order = EXCLUDED.display_order, use_yn = EXCLUDED.use_yn, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
